name: cmux-agent-harness-loop-plugin
description: cmux-only persistent multi-agent harness loop plus a video-style Socrates planning workshop. Claude/OMC orchestrates implementation/review loops with OMX/Codex panes, while /socrates captures an idea, adapts to interview/debate/fast mode and user experience, discusses with Codex, then uses a document-specialist agent to write PRD/brief/handoff artifacts. No /ask-family calls; no dangerous flags by default.
